case_title: JOHANSEN, MARK ERIC VS VAUGHN, CHARLES L.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VAUGHN, CHARLES L.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT VAUGHN, CHARLES L. HEARING SET FOR JAN-29-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHANSEN, MARK ERIC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VAUGHN, CHARLES L. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JOHANSEN, MARK ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT VAUGHN, CHARLES L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHANSEN, MARK ERIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAUGHN, CHARLES L. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,029.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-29-1993, GRANTED
